tradeIdeas.title: Long Brent Crude / Long ASEAN Energy Producers
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $100.64/bbl confirmed (Reuters Apr 1 - -13.2% on Trump 'leaving in 2-3 weeks' signal; tactical dip, not structural reversal). WTI $98.04 confirmed (Reuters Apr 1). Tehran Toll Booth still active ($2M/vessel in yuan); Iran simultaneously fired 7 missiles at Israel with cluster munitions (Jerusalem Post Apr 1) - Iran has not stood down. IRGC threatens 18 US tech firms; Houthis claim third operation. April 6 deadline unchanged. Stress target $95-120/bbl; tail $150-180/bbl on Kharg seizure. PTTEP and Medco cleanest ASEAN equity beta. Reduce conviction only on confirmed ceasefire and commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: Rebuild ASEAN Energy Long / Underweight ASEAN Banks
tradeIdeas.rationale: Brent $100.64 confirmed (Reuters Apr 1) - dip on Trump peace signal, not ceasefire; iTraxx Asia IG est. ~178bp (-4bp). Iran fires 7 missiles at Israel same day Trump signals exit - conflicting signals. ASEAN Energy Equities -6.3% on day (crude correlation); ASEAN Banks +1.6% on spread tightening. Trump 'leaving' rhetoric without Iran ceasefire confirmation creates entry opportunity on energy equities. Trim banks underweight only if iTraxx breaks below 155bp on confirmed ceasefire with commercial Hormuz reopening.

tradeIdeas.title: PHP Short - Dip Opportunity on Trump-Driven Rally
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/PHP 60.15 confirmed (BNM-derived Apr 1, -0.7% on Trump signal). Brent $100.64 (Reuters Apr 1) still ~$30/bbl above Philippines import cost assumption; JKM ~$19.00/MMBtu (est.). Iran fires 7 missiles at Israel (cluster munitions, 16 injured) same day Trump signals exit - no structural de-escalation. IRGC threatens 18 US tech firms (CNBC Apr 1); Kuwait Airport fuel tanks struck. Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel) still active; no Ras Laffan restart path. Stress target 61.00-62.00 intact; April 6 deadline unchanged. Stop only on confirmed ceasefire and Ras Laffan restart.

tradeIdeas.title: IDR Short - Re-Entry on Trump Pause Dip
tradeIdeas.rationale: USD/IDR 16,970 confirmed (BNM-derived Apr 1, -0.5% on Trump signal). Brent $100.64 (Reuters Apr 1) still ~$30.64/bbl above Indonesia's $70 ICP budget assumption; ID 10Y est. 6.95%. Trump peace rhetoric without actual ceasefire creates a re-entry dip; Iran attacking Israel and Kuwait Airport (Apr 1) same day. IRGC tech firm ultimatum adds new risk vector. April 6 deadline; Tehran Toll Booth active. Tail risk 37%; stress target 17,000-17,500. Stop only on ceasefire confirmed.

tradeIdeas.title: iTraxx Asia ex-Japan IG CDS Protection - Hold Through Apr 6
tradeIdeas.rationale: iTraxx Asia IG est. ~178bp (-4bp Apr 1); ASEAN HY est. ~535bp (-7bp). Spread tightening on Trump peace signal is tactical. Iran fires 7 missiles at Israel with cluster munitions and drones Kuwait Airport fuel tanks (Jerusalem Post, KUNA Apr 1) - same day as Trump's exit rhetoric. IRGC threatens 18 US tech firms with cyberattacks from 8pm Tehran time (CNBC Apr 1); new systemic vector. Tehran Toll Booth P&I restoration structurally impossible. 185-200bp remains stress target; April 6 deadline unchanged. Hold CDS protection; do not reduce on Trump rhetoric alone.
instruments: Sapura Energy / Hyflux bond short via CDS

tradeIdeas.title: Long JKM LNG vs Short TTF - Hold Through Apr 6 Deadline
tradeIdeas.rationale: JKM est. ~$19.00/MMBtu (-5.0% Apr 1); TTF est. €52.00/MWh (-6.8%). Both down on Trump peace signal but Tehran Toll Booth ($2M/vessel) still constrains Hormuz LNG flows; Qatar Ras Laffan restart structurally blocked. Houthis sustain Bab el-Mandeb risk (third operation Apr 1). Iran fires 7 missiles at Israel same day Trump signals exit - no ceasefire. Brent $100.64 (Reuters Apr 1). JKM-TTF spread compression tactical; stop only on confirmed Ras Laffan restart and commercial Hormuz reopening.
instruments: Asia LNG spot cargo purchase via intermediary

cfTriggers.description: CRITICAL: Sapura Energy's refinancing window remains structurally closed. iTraxx Asia IG est. ~178bp; ASEAN HY est. ~535bp - Trump rhetoric has not reopened unsecured market. IRGC threatens 18 US tech firms (CNBC Apr 1); Kuwait Airport fuel tanks struck; Iran fires 7 missiles at Israel - kinetic conflict ongoing. Activate secured bank lines, private credit, and DFI-backed structures immediately - April 6 deadline is live binary event.

PTTEP should pre-fund before THB window closes - TH 10Y est. 2.10% (-2bp); USD/THB 32.55 confirmed (BNM-derived Apr 1, +3.3% THB rally on Trump signal). Brent $100.64 (Reuters Apr 1) still boosts upstream EBITDA by $30.64/bbl vs $70 pre-shock; JKM ~$19.00/MMBtu (est.) keeps gas import costs elevated. Tehran Toll Booth still active; Gulf JV toll compliance review urgent. April 6 deadline; execute H2 2026 prefunding before window closes.

Expand USD revolving-credit capacity now. Brent $100.64 (Reuters Apr 1) and JKM ~$19.00 (est.) still structurally elevated vs pre-war; USD/SGD 1.2830 (BNM-derived Apr 1). Trump peace signal tightened iTraxx Asia IG to est. ~178bp - this is the entry window before April 6 re-escalation risk. IRGC threatens 18 US tech firms; Iran attacks ongoing. Execute revolving credit expansion before April 6 deadline.

Hyflux must activate restructuring immediately. Base 15%, stress 48%, tail 37%; Brent $100.64 (Reuters Apr 1); ASEAN HY est. ~535bp. JKM ~$19.00 (est.) sustains gas-fired desalination cost spike. Kuwait Airport fuel tanks struck by Iran drone (KUNA Apr 1) - follow-on from Kuwait power plant attack Mar 30; direct precedent for Hyflux-type infra risk. Toll booth entrenches Hormuz control; Kharg Island risk live through April 6. Pursue private-credit and quasi-sovereign structures urgently.
